# Meridian Freight Inc.

> Full-service machinery export company. We handle equipment pickup, dismantling, container packing, export documentation, and worldwide ocean shipping from the USA and Canada.

## About

Meridian Freight Inc. is a machinery export and logistics company headquartered in Albion, Iowa. Since 2013, we have shipped 1,000+ pieces of heavy equipment to ports in Latin America, Africa, the Middle East, and Central Asia. We serve international buyers who purchase used American agricultural, construction, and industrial equipment and need it professionally packed and shipped overseas.

Our key differentiator: one company handles the entire chain from seller to port — pickup, dismantling, packing, documentation, and ocean freight. One team, one invoice, zero handoffs.

## Services

- [Machinery Dismantling & Container Packing](https://meridianexport.com/services/machinery-packing): Professional disassembly, tagging, photographing, and secure container packing for heavy machinery
- [Container Loading & Export Shipping](https://meridianexport.com/services/container-loading): Space-optimized container loading and international shipping via Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd, and CMA CGM
- [Agricultural Equipment Services](https://meridianexport.com/services/agricultural): Specialized handling for combines, tractors, planters, sprayers, and tillage equipment including phytosanitary compliance
- [Equipment Sourcing & Procurement](https://meridianexport.com/services/equipment-sales): Locate and inspect used machinery from dealers, auctions, and private sellers across North America
- [Export Documentation & Compliance](https://meridianexport.com/services/documentation): Complete export paperwork — invoices, packing lists, bills of lading, certificates of origin, phytosanitary certificates
- [Equipment Storage & Warehousing](https://meridianexport.com/services/warehousing): Secure storage at Iowa HQ and 6 partner warehouses across USA and Canada

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://meridianexport.com/): Overview of all services and company capabilities
- [Pricing](https://meridianexport.com/pricing): Reference rates for 60+ equipment types and 20+ shipping routes
- [Freight Calculator](https://meridianexport.com/pricing/calculator): Free instant cost estimator for machinery export
- [Argentina Buyer Guide](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/argentina): Spanish guide for Argentine buyers evaluating used U.S. ag equipment, port-to-port scope, and local-import handoff
- [Projects](https://meridianexport.com/projects): Portfolio of completed exports — John Deere combines, Case IH headers, sprayers, excavators
- [FAQ](https://meridianexport.com/faq): Answers to common questions about shipping timelines, container sizes, pricing, documentation
- [About](https://meridianexport.com/about): Company history, locations, and differentiators
- [Contact](https://meridianexport.com/contact): Get a free quote — response within 24 hours

## Equipment We Handle

Combines (John Deere, Case IH, Claas), Tractors (John Deere, Case IH, Kubota), Excavators (CAT, Komatsu, Hitachi), Bulldozers, Wheel Loaders, Cranes, Planters (Kinze, John Deere), Sprayers (self-propelled and pull-type), Headers (draper, corn, stripper), Tillage Equipment (discs, rippers, field cultivators), Mining Equipment, Forestry Equipment, Road-Building Equipment.

## Shipping Destinations

Latin America (Brazil, Colombia, Mexico), Middle East (UAE, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, Iraq), Africa (Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana), Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan), Eastern Europe (Romania, Ukraine, Georgia), and anywhere with a seaport.

## Languages

This website is available in three languages:
- English (default): https://meridianexport.com
- Spanish (Latin America): https://meridianexport.com/es
- Russian (Kazakhstan/CIS): https://meridianexport.com/ru
